## Summary

- Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Simulator behavior
- [ ] UI
- [ ] Learning content
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/deployment

## Checks

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Screenshots

Add screenshots for UI changes.

## Protocol Notes

If this changes Raft behavior, cite the paper section, describe the teaching simplification, and list regression tests.
